name: Pumpkin-Crusted Trout
recipeInstructions:
Pumpkin-Crusted Trout
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place a large skillet in the preheated oven.
3. Whisk together the egg white, grated lemon peel, salt, tarragon, ground mustard, and black pepper.
4. Chop the pumpkin seeds into small pieces using a mini chopper or crush them with a rolling pin until they are broken into small pieces.
5. Dredge the flesh side of each trout fillet in the egg white mixture, then coat only one side with the pumpkin seeds.
6. Pour grapeseed oil into the hot skillet, swirling to coat the bottom well.
7. Place the coated trout fillets in the pan, flesh side down.
8. Cook for 8 minutes, then add lemon juice and cook for an additional 2-4 minutes.
9. Serve.
Makes 2 servings.
